explanation: The user wants to use a different cup instead of the currently held cup_0. I first place the current cup_0 on the countertop to free it. Then, I pick up a new cup, cup_1, which is a valid replacement since it is not currently in use. I then proceed with all the not-attempted steps in the old plan using cup_1 instead of cup_0, including placing it on the coffeemachine, toggling it on and off, and finally placing it back on the countertop.
